utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Okay , Mon , back me up here .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Where you work the uh , waiters eat with the waiters , right ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: And the chefs eat with the other chefs , right ?

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I eat by myself in the alley because everybody hates me .

emotion_cause.span: 4_I eat by myself in the alley because everybody hates me .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Look , Ross , really it is ... it is no big deal .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know you wear a white coat , I wear a blue blazer , if that means we can not be friends at work , then so be it .

emotion_cause.span: 6_we can not be friends at work

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey , when I am in a play and you are in the audience , I do not talk to you , right ?

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: So it is you know , it is uh , it is cool .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Yeah , when we are in the audience he does not talk to us , but he does wave .
